---
title: "Test File"
format: html
#mainfont: Times New Roman
filters:
  - callout-png   
---

Some examples with heading levels specified (`##`) only for easier RevealJS navigation. You should be able to test all 4 formats by replacing the `html` on line #3 with `revealjs`, `typst`, or `pdf`.

::: {.callout-png}
Default specifications
:::

##

:::{.callout-png  title=""}
Nothing to see here... (overriding default title with empty space)
:::

##

::: {.callout-png title="Small and tight" image-height="1.5em" header-vpad="0em"}
Smaller image (`image-height="1.5em"`) and tighter banner (`header-vpad="0em"`) 
:::

##

::: {.callout-png title="Different Color" color="#69c4d6" image="pink-panther.png" image-height="8em" header-vpad="1em"}
Blue(ish; `color="#69c4d6"`) with bundled image (pink-panther.png), huge image size (`image-height="8em"`) and wider banner relative to image (`header-vpad="1em"`)
:::

##

::: {.callout-png title="This is BIGGER snoopy" color="#c9c9c3" image="snoopylocal.png" header-vpad="1em" image-height="8em"}

  + bundled extension image  
  + color=grey  
  + height=8em  
  + vertical padding=1em
  
:::

##

::: {.callout-png title="This is smaller snoopy" color="#cb6ed4" image="snoopylocal.png" header-vpad=".5em" image-height="3em"}

with a GIANT snoopy to make up for it!!!

![](images/snoopylocal.png)

:::
